Brain Game

5.0
(3)
Brain Game
5.0
(3)
⭐ Step into the world of puzzles and adventure at Brain Game Dubai, the ultimate escape rooms and board-game experience in Dubai!

Promotions
🚀 Benefit from 20% off your online booking for 4–6 players with code BRAINGAME20 at checkout. Offer valid from 3 July to 31 July.

Highlights
✨ Immerse yourself in thrilling escape rooms with rich themes and interactive storylines
🧠 Solve clever puzzles, crack codes, and work as a team to escape before time runs out
👥 Perfect for friends, families, or team-building
🎲 Relax and socialize afterwards in the on-site board-game café with a wide variety of games
📸 Capture unforgettable moments as you celebrate your escape victories

General Info
📅 Date and time: choose in the ticket selector
⏳ Duration: choose 60, 80 or 120 minutes per room
📍 Location: Rooftop Level, Jumeirah Terrace Building, Jumeirah 1, Dubai
👤 Age requirement: children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult
♿ Accessibility: wheelchair accessible
❓ More info: please consult the FAQs of this experience here

Description
Get ready for a thrilling adventure at Brain Game Dubai ! Step into themed escape rooms full of puzzles that test your logic, creativity, and teamwork. Whether it's a family outing, a fun time with friends, or a team-building activity, Brain Game Dubai offers an unforgettable experience. Plus, after your escape, you can also chat and unwind in the cozy board-game café with snacks and games. Book now for chance to challenge your mind and bond with friend!

🕹️ Escape Rooms
SEVEN
According to tradition, purification of the soul is achieved only if one resists the seven deadly sins — or atones through penance. In this room, you face your own weaknesses and passions: wrath, lust, sloth, envy, greed, gluttony, and pride. Will you resist temptation and reach salvation before divine judgment falls? Beware — the avenger-killer representing that judgment is lurking.
Difficulty Level: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ (5/6)
Category: Adventure / Mystery
Duration: 60 Minutes
Players: 2 – 6 Players

STALKER
Do you really believe you’re alone? Someone is always watching — every step, every private moment. He’s a photographer with dark secrets and dangerous obsessions… and his greatest obsession is you. Can you uncover the clues to reveal his identity before it’s too late? Featuring the first dark room ever included in an escape room experience.
Difficulty Level: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (6/6)
Category: Adventure / Mystery
Duration: 60 Minutes
Players: 2 – 6 Players

CHOCOLATE FACTORY
You’ve been invited to Mr. Charlie Wonka’s mysterious chocolate factory, home to the world’s best-kept secret — the ultimate chocolate recipe. To earn his trust and inherit his legacy, you must pass a series of clever tests and challenges. If you succeed, you’ll unlock the chocolate machine and discover the magic formula!
Difficulty Level: ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆☆ (4/6)
Category: Adventure / Family
Duration: 60 Minutes
Players: 2 – 6 Players

THE OTHERS
A sudden storm forces you to seek shelter in an abandoned house deep in the forest. But you’re not alone. The spirits of children who once lived — and died — here still linger, trapped and restless. Whispers, strange occurrences, and violent manifestations await those who dare to enter. Can you uncover the truth and set their souls free?
Difficulty Level: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (6/6)
Category: Horror – Live Actor
Duration: 80 Minutes
Players: 2 – 6 Players

FOREVER ALONE
He stopped showing up to work. Nobody noticed. In a world full of fake friends and hollow relationships, his absence went unnoticed — until now. It’s been two weeks since anyone’s heard from him, and it’s up to you to step inside his home and uncover the chilling mystery behind his disappearance.
Difficulty Level: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (6/6)
Category: Adventure / Mystery
Duration: 120 Minutes
Players: 2 – 10 Players

LAST LAUGH
Not all laughter is friendly. In this room, you’ll dive into a story of betrayal and deception. Those who smile with you may not stand by you — and those you trust most may be the first to turn. Only by uncovering the truth will you solve the unresolved case and find out who gets the last laugh.
Difficulty Level: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (6/6)
Category: Adventure / Mystery
Duration: 120 Minutes
Players: 2 – 10 Players

Getting there

Brain Game Dubai - Escape Rooms | Café

Jumeirah Terrace Building, Jumeirah 1 (opposite Big Flag Rooftop level Dubai - United Arab Emirates, 0000
